product_overview: NewOLX is a classified marketplace where users can browse product listings, view item details, and manage listings through create, edit, and delete actions. It also provides newsletter subscription and email contact collection through simple web forms.
core_goals: Browse available products on the marketplace homepage
View full details for a selected product listing
Create, edit, and delete product listings
Subscribe to the newsletter with name, email, and message
Manage subscription records through basic CRUD actions

features.name: Browse Products on Homepage
features.description: Users can view the marketplace homepage to see available products and access related pages.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View product cards with images, titles, and prices -> Select a product to open its detail page -> Navigate to other marketplace pages through links

features.name: View Product Detail
features.description: Users can open a single listing to inspect all product information.
user_flows: Navigate to /detail -> View the product image, title, description, price, category, and location

features.name: Create Product Listing
features.description: Users can submit a new product listing with an image upload.
user_flows: Navigate to /formVenta.html -> Fill in the product title, description, price, category, and location -> Upload a product image -> Submit the listing form -> See the newly created listing reflected in the marketplace

features.name: Edit Product Listing
features.description: Users can update an existing product listing and optionally replace its image.
user_flows: Navigate to /edit.html -> Modify the product title, description, price, category, or location -> Upload a new image or keep the existing one -> Submit the updated listing form -> See the updated listing information

features.name: Delete Product Listing
features.description: Users can remove an existing product listing from the marketplace.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Select a product for removal -> Confirm deletion -> See the listing removed from the product list

features.name: Filter Products by Category
features.description: Users can narrow the product catalog to listings from a specific category.
user_flows: Navigate to /ventas.html -> Select a category filter -> View the filtered product list

features.name: Newsletter Subscription
features.description: Users can subscribe to the newsletter by providing contact details and a message.
user_flows: Navigate to /form.html -> Fill in name, email, and message -> Submit the subscription form -> See the subscription saved

features.name: Save Contact Email
features.description: Users can submit an email address through the contact form for storage.
user_flows: Navigate to /form.html -> Enter an email address -> Submit the contact form -> See the email saved

routes.description: Main marketplace homepage with product listings
Product detail page (receives id query param)
Edit product listing page (receives id query param)
All sales listings page with filter by category
API endpoint to fetch all products
API endpoint to fetch single product by id
API endpoint to create new product with image upload
API endpoint to update product with optional image
API endpoint to fetch all subscriptions
API endpoint to fetch single subscription
API endpoint to fetch all emails
API endpoint to save email contact

features.description: View all listed products on the main marketplace page
user_interactions: View product cards with images, titles, prices
Click on a product to view detail page
Navigate to other pages via links

features.description: Form to create a new product listing with image upload
user_interactions: Fill product title, description, price, category, location

api_calls.body: FormData with titulo, descripcion, precio, categoria, ubicacion, imagen

known_limitations.issue: No authentication/authorization implemented - all CRUD operations are public
known_limitations.impact: Anyone can create, update, or delete any product or subscription

known_limitations.issue: Database connection required - app crashes without MySQL running
known_limitations.impact: App may fail if MySQL is not configured in .env

known_limitations.issue: File uploads may fail without uploads/ directory
